File is from jscad/sample-files (Apache-licensed open source). Contains real architectural elements: 2-car garage floor plan with walls, dimensions, fixtures, doors, etc.
Parsed source DXF file: GIS_BOUNDARY, GIS_REFERENCE, and GIS_LABELS do not exist in the original file. These are to be created by the task agent.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real architectural floor plan (2-car garage) from the jscad/sample-files GitHub repository, downloaded from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jscad/sample-files/master/dxf/dxf-parser/floorplan.dxf (1.1 MB, 967 entities). The agent must create three new layers (GIS_BOUNDARY, GIS_REFERENCE, GIS_LABELS) with correct DXF color codes (1=Red, 4=Cyan, 3=Green), draw a rectangle from (0,0) to (1500,1000) on the first layer, add a crosshair centered at (750,500) on the second layer, and add three text annotations with specific positions and heights on the third layer. The output must be saved to a new file without modifying the original.
